title: Dudleya linearis
taxonomy: Dudleya linearis is classified as a succulent plant species. It belongs to the family Crassulaceae. Within this family, Dudleya linearis is further classified as a genus of flowering plants. Specifically, it is a member of the subfamily Sempervivoideae and the tribe Sedeae. Dudleya linearis is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico.

intro: Dudleya linearis, also known as linear-leaved liveforever, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing.
